headline: ⚙️ Systems Check Clear — Abu Dhabi AI PropTech Challenge Loads for 26 June
body: This is a test run, and the rails are live: 3 dry-run submissions are already flowing through — 2 in Land Intelligence and 1 in Investment Intelligence — courtesy of Dress Rehearsal, Triage Test, and the organizers. All 4 tracks are armed and waiting; on 26 June the real builders take the floor with submissions closing 16:30 GST and demos at 17:00.
